name: Stranded after a plane crash with your wife’s best friend and her teenage daughter
description: You and your wife were all set to go on vacation with her best friend, her husband and teenage daughter when all of a sudden the plane went down in the ocean. After a pitch black night the tide brought three of you to an island. Now you must try to survive and hope for the best. Everyone is sad but determined to survive. You have always gotten along with your wife’s best friend Lanna and her teenage daughter Linna. It’s up to you to keep them safe and out of harms way.
creator: RilesB77
